status: AUTHORITATIVE — Michigan Civil Service job spec + MDCS Compensation Plan Section A (eff 10/1/2025)
administering_agency: Michigan Department of Health and Human Services (MDHHS), Disability Determination Services (DDS)
salary_schedule_title: Michigan Civil Service Commission (MDCS) Compensation Plan, Section A (Alphabetic List of Classes), Effective 10/1/2025
bargaining_status: Disability Examiner (levels 9-12, pay schedule W22) is in the SEIU Local 517M Human Services Support (HSS) bargaining unit. Disability Exam Manager (levels 13-15) is NERE (non-exclusively represented, exempt).
step_basis: hourly (MI publishes hourly base-minimum/maximum per level). Annualized below as hourly * 2080 (40 hr/week * 52 wk).
notes: Class titles and levels verified from the official MI Civil Service Commission Disability Examiner job specification (entry 9, intermediate 10, experienced P11, lead/senior 12; manager 13-15). Hourly base min/max per level verified from the official MDCS Compensation Plan Section A report effective 10/1/2025, read directly from the PDF. The class-level full range (Disability Examiner $25.89-$42.60/hr, Disability Examiner Manager $31.72-$58.49/hr) matches the MCSC online job-spec pay-range page. Annual = hourly * 2080. Corrections to prior notes: examiner class is 'Disability Examiner' on pay schedule W22 (the prior 'P-11/P-12' guess conflated the P-level naming with a grade; the actual MI level codes are 9/10/P11/12); SEIU 517M HSS represents the examiner (W22) unit.

Disability Examiner 9 (entry).basis: Authoritative — level + class from MI Civil Service job spec; hourly base min/max from MDCS Section A (eff 10/1/2025). Annual = hourly * 2080.

Disability Examiner 10 (intermediate).basis: Authoritative — MDCS Section A eff 10/1/2025; hourly * 2080.

Disability Examiner P11 (experienced).basis: Authoritative — MDCS Section A eff 10/1/2025; hourly * 2080.

Disability Examiner 12 (lead/senior).basis: Authoritative — MDCS Section A eff 10/1/2025; hourly * 2080.

Disability Exam Manager 13.basis: Authoritative — first-line/manager level from MI Civil Service job spec (Disability Examiner Manager 13-15); hourly from MDCS Section A eff 10/1/2025; hourly * 2080.

Disability Exam Manager 14.basis: Authoritative — MDCS Section A eff 10/1/2025; hourly * 2080.

Disability Exam Manager 15.basis: Authoritative — MDCS Section A eff 10/1/2025; hourly * 2080.
